title: Characterization of Aeromonas species isolated from ornamental fish
author: de Oliveira, Carolina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Data from the evaluation of 300 strains of  Aeromonas spp.  isolated from 123 ornamental fish from 32 different species presenting septicemia, skin and/or eye lesions in a study carried out in Brazil.
steps_raw: Data from the evaluation of 300 strains of  Aeromonas spp.  isolated from 123 ornamental fish from 32 different species presenting septicemia, skin and/or eye lesions in a study carried out in Brazil.
